backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing user registration (max 2 slots), messaging with optional file attachments, timetable entry CRUD with recurrence support, and an admin system reset function. Includes authorization and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing two implemented features: a 5-second hard timeout on auth initialization in App.tsx and React Query retry/staleTime fixes in useQueries.ts to prevent indefinite loading states.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated summaries of all frontend source files describing their purpose, styling approach, and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Base Tailwind CSS entry point defining OKLCH CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, chart colors, sidebar, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell titled 'CoTimetable' that mounts the React app at the `#root` div and loads `src/main.tsx` as an ES module.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that orchestrates auth initialization with a 5-second hard timeout, conditionally renders LandingPage, a loading spinner, ProfileSetupModal, or Dashboard based on auth and profile-fetch state, and treats profile fetch errors as unregistered.
frontend/src/components/AddEditTaskModal: Dialog modal for creating or editing timetable entries with title, start/end datetime inputs, and a three-option recurrence selector (one-time, weekday, weekend), wired to backend mutation hooks.
frontend/src/components/AdminPanel.tsx: A modal dialog component that requires a hardcoded passcode to unlock admin actions, specifically a full system reset that clears all users, messages, and timetable data.
frontend/src/components/AnimatedSkyBackg: A purely decorative fixed background component that renders a layered animated sky with gradients, a starfield image, drifting cloud layers, and floating particles.
frontend/src/components/ChatInterface.ts: A chat UI component supporting text and file attachment messages between two users, rendering message bubbles with timestamps and inline image/file previews.
frontend/src/components/EditableDisplayN: An inline-editable display name component that toggles between a read view with an edit button and an input field with save/cancel controls, persisting changes via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The top-level page layout providing a sticky header with the app logo, an Internet Identity login/logout button, and an admin panel trigger button.
frontend/src/components/MusicToggleButto: A fixed floating button in the bottom-right corner that toggles ambient background music mute state using the useAmbientMusic hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog for new user registration that collects a display name and timezone, then calls the register mutation; blocks dismissal until submission succeeds.
frontend/src/components/TimetableView.ts: A 24-hour calendar grid component that renders timetable entries as positioned blocks for a selected date, supporting add/edit/delete actions and recurring entry logic.
frontend/src/components/UserClockDisplay: Displays live clock cards for the current user and their partner, showing real-time local time, date, and timezone, with skeleton and waiting states for loading/absent partners.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAmbientMusic.ts: A singleton-backed hook that manages a shared ambient music audio instance with mute/unmute toggle, persisting state to sessionStorage and syncing across all hook consumers.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login, logout, identity, and status state to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Provides React Query hooks for backend interactions including fetching/saving user profiles, registration, timetable CRUD, messaging, and blob uploads using the ICP actor.
Implements countdown logic for Sky: Children of the Light recurring events (Geyser, Grandma, Turtle) anchored to Pacific Time 2-hour cycles, returning next occurrence, active status, and countdown values.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet defining a Sky-themed dark color palette using OKLCH tokens, Tailwind base/utilities, custom glass-card and glow utility classes, and Cinzel/Raleway font imports.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrapping the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main authenticated dashboard page displaying collapsible live clocks, a Sky Events navigation button, a timetable panel, and a chat interface side by side.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page with an animated sky background, hero section, Internet Identity login button, hero banner image, and feature highlights for the CoTimetable app.
frontend/src/pages/SkyEventsScreen.tsx: Full-screen page showing a countdown table for Sky game recurring events (Geyser, Grandma, Turtle) with live local and Pacific Time clocks and active-state highlighting.
frontend/src/utils/timezones.ts: Exports a comprehensive list of IANA timezone strings covering all major world regions for use in timezone selection dropdowns.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining dark mode, custom fonts (Raleway, Cinzel), and a Sky: Children of the Light-inspired color palette using oklch tokens (midnight, amber, gold, indigo) alongside shadcn-style semantic color variables.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 31) for a two-user synchronized timetable/chat app on Internet Computer, documenting features, architectural decisions, and a list of known bugs including broken navigation, auth loops, and non-functional UI controls.
